heading: Offload and Query Archived Data
body:
As part of the data lifecycle, if you need to move cold data to a
different storage tier, you can set up an Atlas [Online Archives](online-archive-overview) rule to move data based on a date or custom
criteria. Once Atlas archives your infrequently accessed data, you
have a unified view of your Atlas and Online Archive data through a
read-only federated database instance.
